Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jorin Curse-breaker]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Jorin was known as the Curse-breaker and the Maze-walker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jorin Maze-walker is a legendary Reader who spent years investing a bottle of water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is the Regent of the South who took over after the Emperor's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin Curse-breaker built the original system of prisons under the island.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Jorin Maze-walker laid the foundations of the labyrinth over a thousand years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Jorin Maze-walker designed a stone box to break curses and draw power from Elder artifacts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Jorin Curse-breaker constructed a labyrinth that weaves through Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Jorin left a seal that the Heart overpowered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Jorin Curse-breaker believes Soulbound Vessels have their own consciousness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Jorin Curse-breaker carries a full-sized sword wrapped in cloth.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Jorin may have also been assassinated and was staying with the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin is a target for elimination to win the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin is one of the Emperor's original companions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin's assault is described as vicious and his power overwhelming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin Maze-walker wears dark-tinted glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin Maze-walker is a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Calder decides to take his chances against Jorin.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is a legendary founder of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Talking to Jorin Maze-walker is compared to talking with the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Jorin has a cloth-wrapped sword strapped to his back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Jorin is one of the Emperor's three surviving companions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Jorin created the classification system for curses and malicious Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Jorin Maze-walker used acids and alchemical explosives to carve a wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Jorin was attacked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Jorin proposed a method of sharing knowledge by merging the Intent of two or more individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Jorin invested bandages for Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Jorin joined the group after the Emperor began calling himself the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is knowledgeable about cursed Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin Curse-breaker hewed a rough-cut stone box centuries ago to siphon energy away from powerful curses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin is a character who smokes a pipe.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The crown was to be shipped to Jorin for burial with security.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Jorin is one of the individuals who will step down from rule as part of Estyr's deal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Jorin Maze-walker is the Regent of the South.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor met Jorin briefly on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Jorin covered the retreat of the escaping Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is an individual who could potentially intervene in medical matters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Jorin is an opponent Calder believes they cannot beat without risk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Jorin is one of the names Calder finds while absorbing information through the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder needs to get a message to Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Emeralda is carrying a sealed letter intended for Jorin Curse-breaker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is someone Calder might speak with to find a solution.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Imperial Guard transferred their loyalty to Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin ordered an evacuation of the Capital's citizens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin is a Regent who serves the current administration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is the Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Jorin Curse-breaker uses paper wings decorated with Windwatcher feathers to float.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Jorin Curse-breaker's eyes are silvery pale.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin wields a nameless sword that devours curses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin struck Jarelys Teach with Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin is weakened and unarmed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin is waiting in the Emperor's throne room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin wears shadeglasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin Maze-walker is a target of a potential protest by Cheska Bennett.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jorin is at the helm of a ship and holds a sheathed sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jorin is fought by a host of swords floating in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jorin emits waves of dark energy.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Jorin has hired a Navigator ship under a false name to explore the deep Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Jorin is a wise man who believed books would save everyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Jorin is someone the Emperor suggests standing with him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Jorin was beaten with his own sword by Jarelys Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Champion's blindfold was similar to Jorin's disguise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Jorin is disguised and carries a sword wrapped in bandages in a cello case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Jorin is a character who uses a blade to ward off the Blackwatch Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Jorin Curse-breaker is a character who might know how to restore Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Jorin's sword causes stone to melt and run away in black rivulets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Jorin's Intent focuses on alchemy to sustain him at peak efficiency and keeping the loop closed to outside influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Jorin is staring at Estyr's face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Jorin spoke of governing only in horrified tones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Jorin built the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Jorin has set up a mobile alchemist laboratory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Jorin is one of the most powerful Readers in history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Jorin is waiting among the crowd below with Shera's backup.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Jorin is an ally of Shera who brought a team into the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera intended to rejoin Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera had told Jorin that Syphren's power did not make her stronger or faster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Jorin arrived to rampaging inside the Emperor's Stage looking for Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Jorin arrived at the Emperor’s Stage and ended the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Jorin's full name is Jorin Maze-walker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Jorin is known as Jorin Curse-breaker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Jorin is a character present during the conversation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin is acting as the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin suggested that Estyr Six was on the decline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin is a Regent who leveled a building three streets north.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin carries a bandage-wrapped sword and wears a wide-brimmed hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin uses Intent that can cause people to stumble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin has silver eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — A voice in the wind addresses Jorin regarding his torment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin is a Regent with Intent in his blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin flitted all over the city trading blows with the Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin struck against the Great Elder using his blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin possesses a silver mirror and a bottle of star-like liquid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin's blade was surrounded by a corrosive aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Jorin wears a jacket with many pockets, shadeglasses, and a wide-brimmed hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Jorin's power was stirring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Jorin stayed on the Consultant ship, Bastion’s Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Jorin is represented by a bronze effigy with a sword, hat, and glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Jorin's power drowns the Great Elder in acidic darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Jorin wears a loose white robe.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
